channel.title: dose on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in dose on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Jagjeevan Reaches the Temple of Democracy – Parliament of India
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In continuation of sharing Jagjeevan doses — moments of reflection inspired by 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger Than Life — the journey of this book reached a deeply meaningful milestone: the Parliament of India. It was an honour to present the book to Shri Arjun Ram Meghwal, Hon’ble Minister of State (IC) for Law & Justice and Minister of State for Parliamentary Affairs, Government of India, who also graciously wrote the foreword for the book.

item.title: AI-Assisted Jagjeevan Dose — My ICU Time!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: We often hear that times are changing. In the AI era, change is no longer gradual — it is accelerated. Today, AI agents assist us in writing, thinking, researching, and even making personal decisions. Many of us now do something unimaginable a few years ago: We even confirm what our doctors say… with AI. AI explains reports. AI answers late-night doubts. AI reassures us when anxiety grows. It is that second opinion!

item.title: Jagjeevan at Silver Jubilee of Millennium Batch NIT Kurukshetra
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In earlier article, I talked about the effort to meet and reconnect with friends and family always fills you up—it gives you a true Dose of Jagjeevan I recently received a powerful one at the Silver Jubilee celebration of my Millennium (2K) Batch at NIT Kurukshetra. It was deeply heartwarming to reconnect with old friends, relive shared memories, and celebrate the journey we began together more than two decades ago.

item.title: Dose of Jagjeevan - Balancing the The Fourth Pillar!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Taking a break from our daily routine to spend time with family often feels harder than it should be. Busy schedules, long travel, work pressure, health concerns, distance, or even unresolved misunderstandings slowly become convenient excuses. Yet, deep down, we all know this truth: family gatherings are essential for our mental peace and happiness. We celebrate festivals, birthdays, anniversaries, and milestones to strengthen family bonds and create memories that last a lifetime.

item.title: Dose of Jagjeevan - Frequently meet and greet your family!
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Taking a break from our daily routine to spend time with family often feels harder than it should be. Busy schedules, long travel, work pressure, health concerns, distance, or even unresolved misunderstandings slowly become convenient excuses. Yet, deep down, we all know this truth: family gatherings are essential for our mental peace and happiness. We celebrate festivals, birthdays, anniversaries, and milestones to strengthen family bonds and create memories that last a lifetime.

item.title: 📕Jagjeevan launch@Thoughtworks
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Thoughtworks, Thoughtworkers, and books share a deep and enduring connection. Over the years, hundreds of books have been authored by Thoughtworkers, reflecting a culture rooted in thought leadership, learning, and knowledge sharing. As part of this vibrant thought-sharing community, I recently had the privilege of launching my book 📕 Jagjeevan: Living Larger than Life at the Thoughtworks office and signing copies for colleagues. The moment was special—not just because it was a book launch, but because it was about sharing timeless life lessons and inspirations drawn from the life of my great-grandfather, lessons that feel especially relevant in today’s fast-paced world.
